title: Most Americans think Supreme Court usually backs Trump: Poll
shortDescription: A new poll finds 6 in 10 adults believe the Supreme Court rules for President Trump most of the time despite a big loss with potentially more coming.

title: Voters in Southern California city favor permanent data centers ban
shortDescription: The resounding support by Monterrey Park, California, voters comes after months of protest from residents, who raised concerns over the proposal.

title: Some GOP states declare June ‘Nuclear Family Month’
shortDescription: Several GOP-led states designate June as "Nuclear Family Month," drawing criticism from LGBTQ+ advocates celebrating Pride Month.

title: President Trump continues renovation efforts
shortDescription: USA TODAY's Michelle Del Rey shares the status of President Trump's renovation projects at the White House and across Washington, D.C.

title: Trump: Iran deal could be reached this weekend
shortDescription: President Trump hinted that a deal with Iran could be reached as soon as this weekend as questions swirl around potential breaches of the ceasefire.

title: House votes to end war in Iran in rebuff of Trump
shortDescription: In a rebuff of Trump, the House voted for the first time to end the war in Iran. Four Republicans joined with Democrats to support the resolution.

title: Mullin, Democrats trade barbs in tense DHS funding hearing in Congress
shortDescription: What started as a hearing focused on congressional funding turned into heated exchanges over court orders, private jets and allegations of racism.

title: Top Texas election official to resign ahead of November elections
shortDescription: Jane Nelson, Texas' Secretary of State, announced she will resign July 17 — four months before voters head to the polls in the November general election.

title: See Trump’s growing list of construction projects in DC
shortDescription: Between a 250-foot arch and a 90,000-square-foot ballroom, Trump has big reno plans for the White House and DC. Here's a look.

title: Trump may keep UFC arena outside WH permanently
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said the UFC arena recently installed on the White House lawn could remain up permanently after the June 14 fight is over.

title: Rubio grilled on whether Trump dozed off in public
shortDescription: Secretary of State Marco Rubio, during testimony before a House committee, disputed Rep. Ted Lieu's assertion that Trump fell asleep at public events.

title: Congresswoman storms out of Rubio hearing
shortDescription: During a House hearing with Sec. Marco Rubio, Rep. Sydney Kamlager-Dove walked out after a heated exchange.

title: 'Maybe we'll never, ever take it down,' Trump says of UFC arena at White House
shortDescription: President Trump compared the UFC arena recently installed at the White House to the Eiffel Tower and said it could remain there permanently.

title: Who is Zach Lahn? Iowa GOP stunner
shortDescription: Zach Lahn wins Iowa’s GOP primary for governor after a crowded race, running on public health, agriculture and education issues.

title: The Trump-Republican 'slush fund' brawl isn’t over yet
shortDescription: The DOJ has promised its so-called "anti-weaponization" fund is dead. Democrats want Republicans to prove it.

title: Paxton-Trump White House meeting puts Texas Senate race in focus
shortDescription: President Donald Trump met with Texas Senate candidate Ken Paxton at the White House to discuss the upcoming election vs. James Talarico in November.

title: California election results: Will Spencer Pratt take on Karen Bass?
shortDescription: Ballots are slowly being counted for California’s closely watched gubernatorial contest and Los Angeles’ mayoral race.

title: Takeaways from primary day elections
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's GOP winning streak came to an end in Iowa, while Democrats made historic nominations in New Mexico.

title: House rebuffs Trump, votes for first time to end Iran war
shortDescription: The bipartisan vote came as tensions in the Middle East heated up Wednesday after Iran attacked Kuwait and Bahrain following the latest U.S. strikes.
